tracks.meaning: a plot of land, typically a piece of real estate or property
a large number or amount of something, often used colloquially as 'a lot of'
one's fate, fortune, or destiny, as in 'to cast one's lot'
an object used in games of chance to make random selections or decisions
a parcel of land identified as a unit in a land development or legal description
a batch or consignment of goods, typically sold together as a single unit
a group of items or products manufactured or sold together at the same time
a film or television studio and the buildings and grounds where filming takes place
